content.problemStatement:
You are given two integers N (NвЙ•2)N \ ( N \geq 2)N (NвЙ•2) and SSS. You have to construct an array AAA containing NNN integers such that:


0вЙ§AiвЙ§S0 \leq A_i \leq S0вЙ§AiвАЛвЙ§S for each 1вЙ§iвЙ§N1 \leq i \leq N1вЙ§iвЙ§N
A1+A2+вА¶+AN=SA_1 + A_2 + \ldots + A_N = SA1вАЛ+A2вАЛ+вА¶+ANвАЛ=S
A1&A2&вА¶&AN=0A_1 \mathbin{\&} A_2 \mathbin{\&} \ldots \mathbin{\&} A_N = 0A1вАЛ&A2вАЛ&вА¶&ANвАЛ=0, where &\mathbin{\&}& denotes bitwise AND operator.
The maximum element of the array is minimized.
Find the maximum element of the array AAA.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and SSS вАФ the length of array and sum of array elements respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the maximum element of the array AAA.
